1.title: Local Community
1.grammar_notes:
1. QUESTION WORDS BEFORE TO-INFINITIVE
Chúng ta sử dụng từ để hỏi (who, what, where, when, how) trước động từ nguyên thể có 'to' để diễn tả câu hỏi gián tiếp.
Các động từ thường đứng trước: know, wonder, ask, tell, decide, explain, show, forget, remember, learn, find out.
Ví dụ:
- We don't know what to do to help the community.
- She asked how to get to the nearest shopping mall.
- Can you tell me where to buy authentic lacquerware?
- He showed me how to make a conical hat.
Cũng dùng sau giới từ: I was worried about what to wear.

2. PHRASAL VERBS (Cụm động từ)
Là động từ kết hợp với tiểu từ (trạng từ/giới từ) tạo nghĩa mới.
Một số cụm động từ quan trọng:
- pass down / hand down: truyền lại (qua các thế hệ)
- cut down on: cắt giảm = reduce
- run out of: hết, cạn kiệt
- get on with: có quan hệ tốt với
- set up: thành lập
- turn down: từ chối
- take over: tiếp quản
- find out: tìm ra
- look around: ngắm nghía xung quanh
- come back: trở lại
- deal with: giải quyết = solve

exercises.q: She doesn't know _____ to make pottery.
What does 'artisan' mean in Vietnamese?
Traditional crafts should be _____ to the next generation.
Can you tell me where _____ authentic lacquerware?
They decided _____ a craft workshop in the village.
He showed me how _____ a conical hat.
The artisan _____ down the offer to work in the city.
I wonder _____ to visit in Bat Trang village.
This craft has been _____ from generation to generation.
She asked me what _____ for a souvenir.
Bat Trang is well-known _____ its pottery.
He doesn't know when _____ the craft village.
She is looking forward _____ visiting the silk village.
His son will _____ the workshop when he retires.
We need to _____ on electricity usage.
She _____ with all her colleagues at work.
They have _____ of food supplies.
What does 'preserve' mean?
The village is famous _____ its hand-embroidered pictures.
I was worried about what _____ to the party.

2.title: City Life

vocabulary.vi: hối hả, nhộn nhịp, náo nhiệt
di chuyển từ nơi này đến nơi khác
người đi lại bằng phương tiện công cộng

2.grammar_notes:
1. DOUBLE COMPARATIVES (So sánh kép)
Dùng để diễn tả sự thay đổi song song giữa hai vế.

a) Comparative and Comparative (càng ngày càng):
- Tính từ ngắn: S + V + adj-er + and + adj-er
  Ví dụ: Our embroidering skill is getting better and better.
- Tính từ dài: S + V + more and more + adj
  Ví dụ: Life in the city is more and more stressful.

b) The comparative... the comparative... (càng... càng...):
- The + comparative + S + V, the + comparative + S + V
  Ví dụ: The harder you work, the more you accomplish.
  The more crowded the city is, the more polluted it becomes.
  The better the quality is, the more expensive it will be.

c) Với danh từ: The more/less + N + S + V, the more/less + N + S + V
  Ví dụ: The less paper we waste, the more trees we will save.

2. COMPARISONS OF ADJECTIVES AND ADVERBS
- So sánh bằng: S + be/V + as + adj/adv + as
- So sánh hơn: S + be/V + adj/adv-er + than (ngắn) / more + adj/adv + than (dài)
- So sánh nhất: S + be/V + the + adj-est / the most + adj
- Nhấn mạnh: much/far/a lot + comparative
- Tính từ đặc biệt: good→better→best, bad→worse→worst, far→farther→farthest

exercises.q: The _____ you study, the _____ your results will be.
Life in the city is getting more and more _____.
What does 'bustling' mean?
I chose to _____ by bus when I was in town.
The authority is _____ a plan to solve traffic congestion.
I'm _____ with a cold. I have a sore throat.
The more guests we invite, the _____ the party will be.
This city is _____ expensive than that one.
Tokyo is one of the _____ cities in the world.
What does 'congested' mean?
She is as _____ as her sister.
The _____ the weather is, the _____ I feel.
This restaurant is _____ expensive than the other one.
We need to _____ on using plastic bags.
Where do teenagers often _____ with each other?
What does 'liveable' mean?
Her husband is twice as _____ as she is.
Osaka is the second _____ city in Japan.
The noise makes me _____ stressed and tired.
What does 'pricey' mean?

3.title: Healthy Living for Teens
3.grammar_notes:
1. CONDITIONAL SENTENCES (Câu điều kiện)

a) Modal verbs trong câu điều kiện loại 1:
Thay vì will, có thể dùng can, must, may, might, should.
Ví dụ:
- If she trains harder, she can run faster. (khả năng)
- If you want good mental health, you should balance study and life. (lời khuyên)
- You must get rid of distractions if you want to manage time effectively. (cần thiết)

b) Các loại câu điều kiện:
- Loại 0: If + hiện tại đơn, hiện tại đơn (sự thật hiển nhiên)
- Loại 1: If + hiện tại đơn, S + will/can/should + V (có thể xảy ra ở hiện tại)
- Loại 2: If + quá khứ đơn, S + would/could/might + V (không có thật ở hiện tại)
- Loại 3: If + quá khứ hoàn thành, S + would/could + have + V3 (không có thật trong quá khứ)
- Unless = If...not

c) Đảo ngữ:
- Loại 1: Should + S + V, S + will + V
- Loại 2: Were + S + to + V, S + would + V
- Loại 3: Had + S + V3, S + would have + V3

2. COMPLEX SENTENCES (Câu phức)
Gồm mệnh đề chính + mệnh đề phụ thuộc, nối bằng: because, when, if, although, so that...

exercises.q: If you do exercise regularly, your health _____.
What does 'accomplish' mean?
If she _____ harder, she can run faster.
_____ you study hard, you won't pass the exam.
What does 'anxiety' mean?
If I _____ you, I would study harder.
If he had trained hard, he _____ the match.
You _____ get rid of distractions if you want to manage time.
What does 'priority' mean?
He may get a good job if he _____ good at IT.
Should he _____ free time, he'll play tennis.
What does 'well-balanced' mean?
If it _____ tomorrow, we will cancel the trip.
She went to bed early _____ she would be at school on time.
What does 'minimise' mean?
_____ I tried my best, I couldn't pass the exam.
The doctor suggests that he _____ some weight.
What does 'mental' mean?
If he _____ busy, he would have met you.
I find it _____ to concentrate when there are distractions.

4.title: Remembering the Past

vocabulary.vi: lâu đời, ăn sâu bén rễ

4.grammar_notes:
1. PAST CONTINUOUS TENSE (Thì quá khứ tiếp diễn)
Cấu trúc: S + was/were + V-ing
Cách dùng:
- Diễn tả hành động đang xảy ra tại thời điểm xác định trong quá khứ.
  Ví dụ: At 9.30 yesterday, we were learning English.
- While + QKTD, QKTD: 2 hành động xảy ra song song.
  Ví dụ: My mother was cooking while my father was reading.
- When + QKĐ, QKTD: 1 hành động đang xảy ra thì hành động khác xen vào.
  Ví dụ: We were having dinner when he came yesterday.

2. WISH SENTENCES (Câu ước)
a) Ước không có thật ở hiện tại: S + wish(es) + S + V2/Ved (be → were)
  Ví dụ: I wish Ben were here. / I wish I could swim.
b) Ước không có thật ở quá khứ: S + wish(es) + S + had + V3/Ved
  Ví dụ: She wishes she hadn't failed her exam.
c) Ước về tương lai: S + wish(es) + S + would + V
  Ví dụ: I wish you would stop smoking.
Lưu ý: wish = If only

3. USED TO (Đã từng)
Dùng nói về thói quen trong quá khứ, giờ không còn nữa.
Cấu trúc: S + used to + V
Ví dụ: He used to play football when he was young.
Phân biệt: be/get used to + V-ing (quen với việc gì)

exercises.q: We _____ dinner when he came yesterday.
What does 'ancient' mean?
I wish I _____ fly like a bird.
While they _____ TV, the phone rang.
She wishes she _____ failed her exam last year.
What does 'heritage' mean?
He _____ play football when he was young.
I wish you _____ stop smoking.
At 9.30 yesterday, we _____ English.
What does 'magnificent' mean?
Ben isn't here. I wish Ben _____ here.
She _____ to cook meals with a gas cooker.
My mother was cooking _____ my father was reading.
What does 'worship' mean?
I am _____ to getting up early.
If only I _____ so fat.
What does 'dynasty' mean?
He used to _____ in an office.
I regret not studying harder. I wish I _____ harder.
What does 'cuisine' mean?

5.title: Our Experiences

vocabulary.vi: tất cả động vật của một khu vực
tất cả thực vật của một khu vực

5.grammar_notes:
1. PRESENT PERFECT TENSE (Hiện tại hoàn thành)
Cấu trúc: S + have/has + V3/Ved
Dấu hiệu: already, just, yet, ever, never, since, for, so far, recently, lately
Cách dùng:
- Hành động đã hoàn tất nhưng không rõ thời gian.
- Hành động bắt đầu từ quá khứ kéo dài đến hiện tại (since/for).
- Trải nghiệm: Have you ever visited Ha Long Bay?

2. REPORTED SPEECH (Lời nói gián tiếp)
Quy tắc chuyển đổi:
- said → said that, said to sb → told sb
- Lùi thì: present → past, past → past perfect, will → would
- Đổi đại từ: I → he/she, you → I/he/she
- Đổi trạng từ: now → then, today → that day, here → there, this → that

Các loại câu tường thuật đặc biệt:
- Commands: told/asked sb to-V / not to-V
- Requests: asked sb to-V
- Suggestions: suggested + V-ing / suggested that S + (should) + V
- Promises: promised to-V
- Warnings: warned sb not to-V / warned sb about + N

Verb + to-infinitive: afford, agree, choose, decide, expect, hope, learn, offer, plan, promise, refuse, want...
Verb + V-ing: avoid, consider, deny, enjoy, finish, keep, mind, practice, suggest...

exercises.q: She _____ to Hoi An twice.
What does 'exhilarating' mean?
He said he _____ a student.
Have you ever _____ snorkelling?
She told me that she _____ visit me the next day.
What does 'memorable' mean?
They _____ lived here since 2010.
He said, 'I am tired.' → He said that he _____ tired.
I have _____ finished my homework.
What does 'fauna' mean?
She asked me where _____ the tickets.
He suggested _____ to the museum.
I _____ never seen such a beautiful place.
What does 'coral reef' mean?
He promised _____ me with the project.
She said, 'I will come tomorrow.' → She said she _____ come the next day.
What does 'flora' mean?
He denied _____ the window.
How long _____ you lived here?
The teacher warned us not _____ late.

6.title: Vietnamese Lifestyle: Then and Now
6.grammar_notes:
1. VERBS + TO-INFINITIVE
Các động từ theo sau bởi to-V: afford, agree, appear, arrange, attempt, choose, decide, expect, fail, hope, learn, manage, offer, plan, prepare, pretend, promise, refuse, seem, tend, want, wish...
Ví dụ: She decided to study abroad.

2. VERBS + V-ING
Các động từ theo sau bởi V-ing: admit, avoid, consider, delay, deny, enjoy, finish, imagine, keep, mind, miss, practice, quit, suggest...
Ví dụ: He enjoys playing football.

Cấu trúc + V-ing: be busy, be worth, can't help, can't stand, feel like, go + V-ing (go shopping, go swimming...)

3. SENTENCE PATTERNS WITH ADJECTIVES
- It + be + adj + to-V: It is difficult to learn English.
- S + be + adj + to-V: English is difficult to learn.
- S + be + adj + that clause: I am happy that you passed.

4. ARTICLES (Mạo từ)
- THE: dùng khi danh từ xác định, duy nhất (the sun), đã đề cập trước đó, có mệnh đề quan hệ xác định.
- Zero article (không dùng mạo từ): danh từ chung số nhiều/không đếm được mang nghĩa chung, tên người/địa danh, môn học, bữa ăn.

exercises.q: She decided _____ abroad for further education.

7.title: Natural Wonders of the World

vocabulary.vi: loài có nguy cơ tuyệt chủng

7.grammar_notes:
REPORTED SPEECH (Câu tường thuật - Ôn tập tổng hợp)

1. Thay đổi động từ tường thuật:
- said → said that
- said to sb → told sb

2. Lùi thì:
- Simple present → Simple past
- Present continuous → Past continuous
- Present perfect → Past perfect
- Simple past → Past perfect
- will → would, can → could, may → might, must → had to

3. Đổi đại từ: I → he/she, we → they, you → I/he/she/they

4. Đổi trạng từ:
- this → that, these → those, now → then
- today → that day, yesterday → the day before
- tomorrow → the next day, here → there
- ago → before, last → the previous

5. Các dạng đặc biệt:
a) Với to-infinitive: promised/agreed/offered/refused/threatened/warned/reminded/encouraged/invited to-V
b) Với V-ing: admitted/denied/apologized for/accused sb of/congratulated sb on/insisted on/suggested/thanked sb for + V-ing
c) Câu hỏi: asked if/whether (Yes/No), asked + wh-word
d) Mệnh lệnh: told/asked/ordered sb to-V / not to-V

exercises.q: He said, 'I like my job.' → He said that he _____ his job.
What does 'biodiversity' mean?
She said, 'I am studying.' → She said she _____ studying.
He said to me, 'I will come tomorrow.' → He told me he _____ come _____.
What does 'sustainable' mean?
'I can swim,' she said. → She said she _____ swim.
She asked me _____ I liked music.
What does 'majestic' mean?
'Don't be late!' → The teacher told us _____ late.
He promised _____ me with my homework.
What does 'ecosystem' mean?
'Where do you live?' → She asked me where I _____.
He denied _____ the money.
What does 'paradise' mean?
She apologized _____ being late.
'Have you been there?' → He asked _____ I had been there.
What does 'endangered species' mean?
The teacher reminded us _____ our homework.
She congratulated me _____ passing the exam.
He insisted _____ paying for the meal.

8.title: Tourism
8.grammar_notes:
RELATIVE CLAUSES (Mệnh đề quan hệ)

1. Mệnh đề quan hệ xác định (Defining):
- Cần thiết cho nghĩa câu, không có dấu phẩy.

2. Mệnh đề quan hệ không xác định (Non-defining):
- Cung cấp thêm thông tin, có dấu phẩy, có thể bỏ.
- Dùng khi: danh từ riêng, có this/that/these/those, có TTSH.

3. Đại từ quan hệ:
- WHO: thay cho người (chủ ngữ)
- WHOM: thay cho người (tân ngữ)
- WHICH: thay cho vật
- THAT: thay cho cả người và vật (chỉ trong mệnh đề xác định)
- WHOSE: sở hữu (thay cho his, her, its, their)

4. Trạng từ quan hệ:
- WHERE: thay cho nơi chốn (in/at which)
- WHEN: thay cho thời gian (in/on/at which)
- WHY: thay cho lý do (for which)

5. Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ:
- Chủ động: V-ing (The man standing there is my teacher)
- Bị động: V3/ed (The book written by him is interesting)
- To-infinitive (The first person to arrive...)

exercises.q: The man _____ is standing there is my teacher.
What does 'itinerary' mean?
The book _____ I bought yesterday is interesting.
Ha Long Bay, _____ is in Vietnam, is a UNESCO site.
What does 'package holiday' mean?
The girl _____ father is a doctor is my friend.
This is the place _____ we first met.
What does 'ruinous' mean?
Sunday is the day _____ I usually go out.
The reason _____ he was late was the traffic.
What does 'homestay' mean?
The man _____ I spoke to was very kind.
The woman _____ at the desk is the receptionist.
What does 'wander' mean?
The letter _____ by my grandmother was very touching.
She is the first person _____ the summit.
What does 'domestic tourism' mean?
Hue, _____ is the ancient capital, has many monuments.
The students _____ passed the exam were very happy.
What does 'global warming' mean?

9.title: World Englishes

vocabulary.vi: sử dụng được hai ngôn ngữ

9.grammar_notes:
1. PASSIVE VOICE (Câu bị động)
Cấu trúc: S + be + V3/Ved + (by O)

Bảng các thì:
- Simple present: am/is/are + V3
- Present continuous: am/is/are + being + V3
- Present perfect: have/has + been + V3
- Simple past: was/were + V3
- Past continuous: was/were + being + V3
- Past perfect: had + been + V3
- Simple future: will + be + V3
- Modal: can/must/should/may + be + V3

Lưu ý:
- Bỏ by + people/someone/they
- Giữ by + danh từ riêng/chung
- 2 tân ngữ: đưa tân ngữ gián tiếp lên làm chủ ngữ
  He was given a book (by me). / A book was given to him.
- Động từ đi với TO: give, send, show, lend, tell, pay...
- Động từ đi với FOR: make, buy, get, order, do...

2. ADJECTIVES vs. ADVERBS
- Adjective: bổ nghĩa cho danh từ (a careful driver)
- Adverb: bổ nghĩa cho động từ (drive carefully)
- Quy tắc: adj + ly = adv (careful → carefully, quick → quickly)
- Ngoại lệ: good → well, fast → fast, hard → hard, late → late

exercises.q: Rice _____ in many Asian countries.
What does 'bilingual' mean?
The dishes _____ washed by her every day.

What does 'fluent' mean?

What does 'borrowed word' mean?

He drives very _____.
What does 'official language' mean?
She sings _____.
The letter _____ written by her yesterday.
He is a _____ runner. He runs very _____.
What does 'translate' mean?
This bridge _____ built in 1990.
She speaks English _____.
A new school _____ be built next year.
What does 'immigrant' mean?

10.title: Planet Earth

vocabulary.vi: rất thú vị và hấp dẫn

10.grammar_notes:
NON-DEFINING RELATIVE CLAUSES (Mệnh đề quan hệ không xác định)

Đặc điểm:
- Cung cấp thêm thông tin về danh từ đã xác định.
- Có dấu phẩy ngăn cách.
- Có thể bỏ đi mà câu vẫn đủ nghĩa.
- KHÔNG dùng THAT.

Dùng khi:
- Danh từ là tên riêng: Hanoi, which is the capital of Vietnam, is very crowded.
- Có this/that/these/those: This book, which I bought yesterday, is very interesting.
- Có tính từ sở hữu: My father, who is a doctor, works at the hospital.

Đại từ quan hệ:
- WHO: cho người (chủ ngữ)
- WHOM: cho người (tân ngữ)
- WHICH: cho vật, hoặc thay cho cả mệnh đề trước
  Ví dụ: He passed the exam, which made his parents happy.
- WHOSE: sở hữu

Lưu ý: WHICH có thể thay thế cho cả mệnh đề:
- She won the prize, which surprised everyone.
- He arrived late, which annoyed the teacher.

exercises.q: Hanoi, _____ is the capital of Vietnam, is very crowded.
What does 'ecological balance' mean?
My father, _____ is a doctor, works at the hospital.
She won the prize, _____ surprised everyone.
What does 'habitat' mean?
Mr. Smith, _____ daughter is a teacher, lives next door.
This book, _____ I bought yesterday, is very interesting.
What does 'pesticide' mean?
He arrived late, _____ annoyed the teacher.
Paris, _____ I visited last year, is beautiful.
What does 'food chain' mean?
The Mekong River, _____ flows through Vietnam, is very long.
My teacher, _____ I admire greatly, retired last year.
What does 'vital' mean?
London, _____ is the capital of England, attracts millions of tourists.
She passed the exam, _____ made her parents proud.
What does 'nature reserve' mean?
Da Nang, _____ beaches are beautiful, is a popular destination.
The car, _____ was very expensive, broke down.
What does 'climate change' mean?

11.title: Electronic Devices

vocabulary.vi: có thể mang theo, xách tay

11.grammar_notes:
SUGGESTIONS (Cấu trúc gợi ý/đề nghị)

12 cấu trúc đề nghị:
1. S + suggest/recommend/advise + V-ing
   Ví dụ: He suggested travelling together for safety.
2. S + suggest/advise/recommend + (that) + S + (should) + V
   Ví dụ: I suggest (that) we go out to have dinner.
3. Let's + V
   Ví dụ: Let's go to the cinema.
4. Why don't we/you + V?
   Ví dụ: Why don't we try a new restaurant?
5. Should/Shall we + V?
   Ví dụ: Shall we go for a walk?
6. What about/How about + V-ing?
   Ví dụ: How about going shopping?
7. Why not + V?
   Ví dụ: Why not buy a smartwatch?
8. I think we/you should + V
   Ví dụ: I think you should buy an e-reader.
9. Would/Do you mind + V-ing?
10. Would you mind if + V quá khứ?
11. Do you mind if + V hiện tại?
12. Would you like to + V? (mời)

Lưu ý: Sau suggest that + S, động từ luôn ở nguyên thể không 'to'.
Ví dụ: The doctor suggests that he lose some weight.

exercises.q: He suggested _____ together for safety.
What does 'touchscreen' mean?
I suggest that we _____ out to have dinner.
Why don't we _____ a new restaurant?
What does 'wireless' mean?
How about _____ to the museum?
Let's _____ a smartwatch for dad.
What does 'portable' mean?
Shall we _____ for a walk?
The doctor suggests that he _____ some weight.
What does 'virtual' mean?
Why not _____ an e-reader instead?
I think you _____ buy a robotic vacuum cleaner.
What does 'aluminium' mean?
Would you mind _____ the window?
She recommended _____ that new app.
What does 'eco-friendly' mean?
Would you like _____ a cup of coffee?
Do you mind if I _____ here?
What does 'smartwatch' mean?

12.title: Career Choices
12.grammar_notes:
DEPENDENT ADVERBIAL CLAUSES (Mệnh đề trạng ngữ phụ thuộc)

1. Mệnh đề chỉ thời gian (Time):
Liên từ: after, before, until, when, since, as soon as, while, by the time
Ví dụ: Before I leave, I'll give you a call.
After + S + had + V3, S + V quá khứ

2. Mệnh đề chỉ nơi chốn (Place):
Liên từ: where, wherever, anywhere, everywhere
Ví dụ: Wherever there is life, there is love.

3. Mệnh đề chỉ lý do (Reason):
Liên từ: because, as, since → so/therefore
Because of + V-ing / N phrase
Ví dụ: We cancelled the trip because our mother was ill.

4. Mệnh đề chỉ sự nhượng bộ (Concession):
Liên từ: although, though, even though → but
Despite/In spite of + N phrase/V-ing
Ví dụ: Although I tried my best, I couldn't pass the exam.

5. Mệnh đề chỉ mục đích (Purpose):
Liên từ: so that, in order that, in case, for fear that
In order to / so as to + V
Ví dụ: She went to bed early so that she would be on time.

6. Mệnh đề chỉ kết quả (Result):
so + adj/adv + that / such (a) + N + that
Ví dụ: His actions are so quick that we can't match him.

exercises.q: _____ I leave, I'll give you a call.
What does 'career' mean?
We cancelled the trip _____ our mother was ill.
_____ I tried my best, I couldn't pass the exam.
What does 'demanding' mean?
She went to bed early _____ she would be on time.
His actions are _____ quick that we can't match him.
What does 'vocational' mean?
_____ the cold weather, she went out.
They are _____ wonderful players that no one can beat them.
What does 'well-paid' mean?
I met him _____ I was crossing the street.
_____ there is life, there is love.
What does 'flexible' mean?
He took a raincoat _____ it might rain.
She works hard _____ she can support her family.
What does 'entrepreneur' mean?
_____ he had eaten dinner, he went to bed.
The exam was _____ difficult that many students failed.
What does 'rewarding' mean?
